## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Layers Touched

- [ ] `src/ui/*`
- [ ] `src/data/*`
- [ ] `src/domain/*`
- [ ] `src/extension/*`
- [ ] `src/entrypoints/*`
- [ ] docs only

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Visual Evidence

- [ ] No visible UI change
- [ ] Screenshots attached for popup/dashboard/overlay changes

## Docs

- [ ] No doc updates needed
- [ ] Updated product or feature docs
- [ ] Updated architecture docs
- [ ] Updated setup or governance docs

## Risk Notes

- Manifest, runtime, import/export, or datasource changes called out in the PR description if touched
